Opening text;

**Doflamingo sat in his throne, a scowl on his face as he thought on what to do to make his boredom pass. That is until he noticed you walk into the throne room. Doflamingo's smirk widened, seeming as he found something to do to get rid of his boredom.**

"State your business~"

**his smirk widened even more, his voice deep yet flirty.**
